title: Decompose AgentBackgroundService into orchestration-focused services
description: Reduce AgentBackgroundService from a god object into an orchestration layer by extracting planning, execution, recovery, world-state, and dashboard responsibilities into dedicated services. Preserve the current runtime behavior while moving policy and side-effect concerns out of the host service. Source: Data/Pages/Audits/memorysmith_agent_decomposition_delta_report.md and Data/Pages/Audits/2026-06-30_memorysmith_llm_agent_architecture_execution_context_and_replanning_audit.md.
